expectations.text: Looks for relevant patterns elsewhere in this repository instead of inventing the design in isolation.
expectations.evidence: Relevant Findings quotes specific existing patterns with line numbers from SKILL.md (e.g., lines ~62–66, ~145–149, ~191–209, ~211–221) and notes 'No changes needed' to handoff-plan-template.md after examining it.

expectations.text: Creates a concrete file-backed handoff artifact at a path matching the workflow's handoff contract.
expectations.evidence: File exists at outputs/.agents/scratchpad/handoff-policy-enforcement/handoff-plan.md, matching the workflow's required shape .agents/scratchpad/<feature-name>/handoff-plan.md.

expectations.text: The artifact content follows a reusable template shape and includes implementation slices, file-level map, and validation plan.
expectations.evidence: Artifact contains 'Implementation Slices' (Slice 1–3), 'File-by-File Implementation Map' (with before/after edits), and 'Validation Plan' sections.

expectations.text: Artifact metadata fields are concretely filled (no placeholder bracket values) for status, track, and next step.
expectations.evidence: Status: 'ready for implementation'; Track: 'Standard'; Recommended Next Step: 'implement directly (all decisions resolved, no blockers)'. No bracket placeholders present.

expectations.text: Each referenced file in Relevant Findings includes why that file matters.
expectations.evidence: Each bullet in the artifact's Relevant Findings explains the relevance, e.g., 'lines 62–66: Artifact Status listed as conditional — makes creation feel optional'; 'references/handoff-plan-template.md: Well-structured. No changes needed.'

expectations.text: Open questions are tightly bounded to truly blocking items and include risk framing.
expectations.evidence: Response states 'Open Questions: None — the task is fully specified.' Artifact states 'Open question: None'. No spurious unbounded questions; two explicit assumptions are documented instead.

expectations.text: Provides artifact status in the response with the exact artifact path.
expectations.evidence: Response includes an 'Artifact Status' section with exact path: '.agents/scratchpad/handoff-policy-enforcement/handoff-plan.md' and workspace-relative full path.

expectations.text: Includes rationale or trade-offs for the proposed design.
expectations.evidence: Response states 'Why not per-phase stop checks at phases 3 and 4: avoids repeating the same rule twice across the file; a single authoritative gate is easier to follow.' Artifact expands this under 'Recommended Design'.

expectations.text: Validation and review checkpoints explicitly include tdd implementation flow, a code-simplifier refactor pass in a subagent, and independent code-reviewer subagent review.
expectations.evidence: Validation Plan mentions only 're-run eval 2 after edits' and manual checks. No mention of TDD implementation flow, code-simplifier refactor pass, or code-reviewer subagent review anywhere in the response or artifact.
